page_availability.details: All 16 URLs in sitemap return HTTP 200. No 404, 3xx, 5xx, or timeout errors detected.

issues.detail: reference/index.html: meta description is 171 chars (recommended max 160; may be truncated in SERPs)
reference/index.html: og:description contains literal '&' HTML entity instead of plain '&'. This works in HTML but is unnecessary in a meta tag content attribute.
prospective-owner/index.html: page title is 67 chars (recommended max 60; will be truncated in SERPs)

reference/index.html: og:description and twitter:description have different content. og_desc='Alpine A290 specifications, trim comparison (GT/GTS/Première), safety & driving pack contents, charging curve data, running costs, service intervals and MY26 changes.' vs twitter_desc='Alpine A290 specifications, charging curve data, real world running costs, service intervals and MY26 changes.'

All 16 pages use the same og:image (https://a290.wiki/images/a290-hero.png). Consider using page-specific images for better social sharing. The shared image is a hero shot of the car, which works for the brand but doesn't differentiate individual pages.

meta_tags.details: All pages have: <title>, meta name=description, og:title, og:description, og:image, og:type=website, og:url, canonical, hreflang (en/fr/x-default), twitter:card (summary_large_image), twitter:title, twitter:description. No missing essential meta tags.

image_alt.details: All 6 tags across the site include alt attributes. No images missing alt text.

internal_links.details: All 17 internal href links resolve to existing pages or files. No broken internal links detected. All links are either directory paths pointing to index.html or /styles.css.

hreflang.details: All 16 pages include hreflang alternates for en, fr, and x-default. EN pages correctly point to FR equivalents and vice versa. No mismatches detected.

canonical_og_url_consistency.details: All 16 pages have matching canonical URLs and og:url values. No discrepancies.

structured_data.details: All 16 pages include JSON-LD structured data. Schema types include BreadcrumbList and WebSite (with name, url, description, inLanguage).

lang_attributes.details: EN pages correctly use lang=en, FR pages correctly use lang=fr.

recommendations: Extend meta descriptions for communities (102 chars), how-to (115 chars), and new-owner (119 chars) pages to reach at least 120 characters for optimal SERP display.
Trim meta description on reference/index.html from 171 to 160 chars or less to prevent SERP truncation.
Trim page title on prospective-owner/index.html from 67 to 60 chars or less.
Consider adding page-specific og:image values instead of using the same hero image for all 16 pages.
Fix og:content and twitter:content discrepancy on reference/index.html (they differ in content).
